canonical_answer: A man wearing a grey t-shirt and white apron stands behind a bar counter. A large red bottle of V8 juice sits on the left side near a silver blender base. Two glasses filled with ice and yellow liquid are positioned on the right side of the workspace. Three small white bowls containing brown liquid are arranged in front of the man. Shelves stocked with various liquor bottles are visible in the background.

question: Describe the sequence of actions performed by the man involving the large red bottle and his hands throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a large red bottle sits on the counter next to glasses; at 6s, the man raises his right hand with palm facing forward; at 8s, the man begins holding the large red bottle; at 16s, the bottle rests on the counter again with text overlay visible.

question: Describe the arrangement of containers and ingredients visible on the counter during the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, two glasses with ice and three bowls with brown liquid are arranged on the counter; at 4s, a tall clear glass carafe stands in the center; at 8s, a small bottle of Tabasco sauce appears near the red bottle; at 16s, a bottle of horseradish is visible next to the juice.
